---
title: Meet the team
author: "Lexi Payne"
---

This project was developed by **\[Team GGPLOT]** For [STA 199: Introduction to Data Science](https://sta199-s26.github.io/) at Duke University.
The team is comprised of the following team members.

-   **David Boham**: Junior from Houston, Texas studying Computer Science. This is my LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dboham/
-   **Camden Chin**: Senior from New York City studying Computer Science and Visual Media. This is my LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/camden-chin/. 
-   Team member 3: One sentence description of Team member 3 (e.g., year, major, etc.). Optionally,  hyperlink the team name to homepage or social profile (LinkedIn, etc.)  of team member.
-   Team member 4: One sentence description of Team member 4 (e.g., year, major, etc.). Optionally,  hyperlink the team name to homepage or social profile (LinkedIn, etc.)  of team member.
-   ...
